name: Speed Factor
short_description: An old-school racing game featuring 2D pixelated visuals, inspired by 80s and 90s classics, arcade-style gameplay, rock songs and high speed!
detailed_description:
Inspired by 80s and 90s classics, Speed ​​Factor is an old-school racing game with pixelated graphics, arcade driving style, rock songs and some awesome classic cars!

Set the difficulty level and traction assist level to your liking. With 3 levels each, you can make the game as challenging as you would like!

Race through 50 different tracks spread across 5 locations! In each of these locations, you can choose the order of the races you want to compete! Win races and earn money, so you can improve your ride!

Become the champion!

FEATURES
- 50 different tracks;
- 5 different locations;
- 2D pixelated graphics;
- Many items to buy and improve your car;
- Punk Rock songs;
